feedback.text: Love the initiative Would like to take this opportunity to ask to take a look on the game protection side as well, since we have seen several occasions of games we own get destroyed; even though we had no mention of the game having a "lifespan", and those games are advertised as "products" while being treated as "services" (for example, the game "the crew"). I believe most people are not asking for those games to be supported indefinitely, but rather for them to have an end of life plan, which could be handled a number of ways (a way to host the game locally, or on a server, or have an offline mode able to be ran) thank you very much for reading this feedback
